compressed_prompt: compose a lowercase letter to a friend, urging them to vote, no commas or informal tone.
response:
dear friend 
its time to make your voice heard by voting in the upcoming election 
every vote matters and yours can be the one that tips the balance 
dont let others decide for you take control and cast your ballot 
your future is worth it 
vote for the issues that matter to you 
vote for the change you want to see 
make a difference 
sincerely yours
